Title: Award Certification Clause Auto-Append
Description: Inject mandatory tribunal certification template into award generation pipeline before e-sign routing.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Auto-attaches to final PDF/JSON; 2. Hashed to Merkle tree; 3. Pipeline fails if omitted

Title: AI Contribution Metadata Capture & Sealing
Description: Log AI model versions, prompt hashes, output versions, and tribunal approval status.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Stored in Elasticsearch; 2. Linked to award_id; 3. Exportable as certificate

Title: Per-Case AI Opt-Out Toggle & Pipeline Bypass
Description: UI toggle that disables AI scaffolding pipeline when arbitrator selects Q26 opt-out.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Respects tribunal RBAC; 2. Fallback to manual templates; 3. Audit-logged per case

Title: Neo4j Conflict Graph Schema & Relationship Weighting
Description: Deploy graph model for arbitrators, counsel, firms, prior cases, experts, institutions.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Schema deployed & indexed; 2. Relationships weighted by recency/ties; 3. Query latency <500ms

Title: AI Conflict Scanner (NLP Extraction + Probability Scoring)
Description: NLP pipeline that extracts names/firms from new filings and scores conflict probability (0–100%).
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Flags >30% for review; 2. False positives dismissible & logged; 3. Runs on new submissions

Title: Disclosure Workflow UI + SLA Timers + Fallback Comms
Description: In-app dashboard for tribunal acknowledgment, red-line amendments, and 48/72hr SLA enforcement.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. One-click acknowledgment; 2. SMS/email fallback on timeout; 3. Case pause if unresponsive

Title: Audit Trail & Kenya DPA Retention Engine
Description: Immutable logs + automated purging of non-matches after 180 days; 5-yr post-case retention for matches.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Logs hashed to Merkle root; 2. Retention enforced by OPA; 3. ODPC-compliant export

Title: ICS Limited / eSign Africa CA API Integration
Description: Integrate licensed CA providers for QES generation, sandbox testing, and rate-limited prod routing.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. <3s signing cycle in sandbox; 2. Error handling & retries; 3. Certificate schema mapped

Title: HSM-Backed Signing Flow + RFC 3161 Timestamp Sync
Description: Secure document hashing → CA HSM → signature return → platform JWT binding + timestamp authority.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Zero platform key access; 2. Non-repudiation proof generated; 3. Timestamp synced & logged
Traceability: Spec §3.5, Q24, Kenya Evidence Act s.106B

Title: OCSP/CRL Validation + Certificate Chain Checker
Description: Pre-signature validation of certificate revocation status, chain trust, and expiry monitoring.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Rejects revoked/expired certs; 2. Graceful fallback triggered; 3. Validation event logged

Title: Wet-Sign Fallback + Notary Upload Workflow
Description: Generate printable award PDF, track courier, accept notary scan, apply manual seal if CA fails.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Fallback triggers <2s on CA timeout; 2. Tracking ID stored; 3. Manual seal cryptographically tagged
Traceability: Spec §3.5, Q27, NY Convention Art IV

Title: Consent Management & ODPC-Compliant PII Vault
Description: Capture explicit e-sign consent at intake, encrypt, store, and enable revocation workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Consent log exportable; 2. Revocation blocks signing; 3. PII redacted post-issuance

Title: AI Orchestrator + Model Registry (MLflow/KServe)
Description: Central routing service for NLP, scheduling, compliance, translation models with versioning & rollback.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Latency <3s p95; 2. Canary deployment supported; 3. Drift triggers auto-rollback

Title: Rule Engine State Machine (Camunda + Rule Packs)
Description: JSON/YAML procedural definitions for UNCITRAL/KCAB/AfGAC/ad hoc with milestone auto-generation.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. New pack deployed without code release; 2. Procedural deviations flagged; 3. Lex arbitri auto-selected

Title: WORM Document Storage + SHA-256 Merkle Tree Verification
Description: Chunked uploads, client-side compression, cryptographic hashing, immutable versioning, hash verification on export.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. <5s upload for 50MB on 3G; 2. Tamper-evident on access; 3. Export bundle court-admissible

Title: Offline-First PWA Sync + Chunked Resume
Description: Local IndexedDB cache, conflict resolution, background sync, SMS/WhatsApp delivery proofs.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Zero data loss offline; 2. Sync resumes automatically; 3. Read receipts hashed to case log

Title: Pilot Acceptance Metrics Dashboard
Description: Real-time dashboard tracking award compliance, disclosure SLAs, e-sign success, AI opt-out adherence, satisfaction.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. All Spec §4.3 metrics visible; 2. Exportable for legal audit; 3. Alert thresholds configurable

Title: NY Convention Art. IV Automated Validation Checker
Description: Pre-export validation of award format, signatures, seat tag, reasoning, attachments, and enforcement readiness.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. 100% pass rate on pilot awards; 2. Flags missing formalities; 3. Generates enforcement bundle

Title: Risk Monitoring Alerts (CA Downtime, AI Drift, Sync Failure)
Description: Prometheus/Grafana alerts for infrastructure, AI, and connectivity risks with automated mitigation triggers.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Alerts route to PagerDuty/SMS; 2. Fallback workflows auto-engage; 3. Post-incident report generated

Title: ODPC Compliance Reporting + Data Residency Router
Description: OPA policy engine routing PII to Nairobi region, generating ODPC reports, enforcing legal holds.
Acceptance Criteria: 1. Zero DPA violations in pen test; 2. Erasure requests processed <72hrs; 3. Audit-ready reports
